BaseField.Name: Label55
BaseField.Text: Landowner, Timber Owner and/or Operator Name

BaseField.Name: DG Names
BaseField.DataFilter: [Contact Information Relation].[Related Record ID] = '{{Related Record ID}}' AND ([Forest Practices Aerial Chemical Application].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [Forest Practices Application Notification].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [FPAN Amendment Request].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [FPAN Notice of Transfer].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [FPAN Renewal].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [Long-Term Application 5-Day Notice].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [Step 1 Long Term FPA].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}') AND [Contact Information Relation].[Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Legal Description
BaseField.DataFilter: [Legal Description].[Related Record ID] = '{{Related Record ID}}' AND [Legal Description].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND ([Forest Practices Aerial Chemical Application].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [Forest Practices Application Notification].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [FPAN Amendment Request].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [FPAN Notice of Transfer].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [FPAN Renewal].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [Long-Term Application 5-Day Notice].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' OR [Step 1 Long Term FPA].[FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}')

BaseField.Name: Columbia River Gorge National Scenic Area
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Columbia River Gorge National Scenic Area
BaseField.Text: Columbia River Gorge National Scenic Area

BaseField.Name: DG Fee Information
BaseField.DataFilter: [Fee].[Related Record ID] = '{{Related Record ID}}' OR ([Fee].[Related Record ID] = '{{Renewal ID}}' AND [Fee].[Related Record ID] <> '')

BaseField.Name: DG Communication Log
BaseField.DataFilter: [Primary Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Primary Record ID] <> ''

BaseField.Name: WDFW DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: WNHP DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: USFWS DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Science Team DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] = 'Enabled'

BaseField.Name: DAHP DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Tribal DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Notes History
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: FPAN Date of Receipt
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPA/N Date of Receipt calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN 14-Day Comment Period End Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN 14-Day Comment Period End Date calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN Decision Due Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Decision Due Date calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN Decision View Information
BaseField.Text: Edit or View FPA/N Decision Information?

BaseField.Name: FPAN Decision Information DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Decision Control] = 'FPANNOD' AND [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Status] <> 'Draft'

BaseField.Name: FPAN Decision Effective Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Decision Effective Date calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN Decision Expiration Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Decision Expiration Date calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN Decision Number of Years Effective
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Decision Number of Years Effective calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN or Aerial View Status History
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN or Aerial View Status History checkbox
BaseField.Text: View FPA/N or Aerial Status History?

BaseField.Name: FPAN or Aerial Status History DG
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN or Aerial Status History DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' AND [ARP Related Record ID] <> '' AND ([Form Type] = 'Forest Practices Application Notification' OR [Form Type] = 'Forest Practices Aerial Chemical Application')

BaseField.Name: FPAN Renewal View Additional Renewal Information
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Renewal View Additional Renewal Information? checkbox

BaseField.Name: FPAN Renewal Date of Receipt
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Renewal Date of Receipt calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN Renewal Effective Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Renewal Effective Date calendar control

BaseField.Name: FPAN Renewal View Status History
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: FPAN Renewal View Status History checkbox

BaseField.Name: FPAN Renewal Status History DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' AND [ARP Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Form Type] = 'FPAN Renewal'

BaseField.Name: LTA Date of Receipt
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: LTA date of receipt calendar control

BaseField.Name: LTA 14-Day Comment Period End Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: LTA 14-day comment period end date calendar control

BaseField.Name: LTA Decisions Due Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: LTA decisions due date calendar control

BaseField.Name: LTA View LTA Decision Information
BaseField.Text: Edit or View LTA Step 1 Decision Information?

BaseField.Name: btnLTADecisionInformationRemoveSelected
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Remove Selected LTA Decision Information Button

BaseField.Name: LTA Step 1 Decision Information DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Decision Control] = 'LTASTEP1NOD' AND [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Status] <> 'Draft'

BaseField.Name: LTA Step 1 Status History DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' AND [ARP Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Form Type] = 'Step 1 Long Term FPA'

BaseField.Name: 5 Day Notice View or Add
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: 5 Day Notice View or Add checkbox
BaseField.Text: View or Add LTA 5-Day Notice Information?

BaseField.Name: DG 5-Day Notice
BaseField.DataFilter: [FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' AND [Status] <> 'Draft' AND [Status] <> 'Required Signature Pending' AND [Status] <> 'Required Signatures Received' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: SEPA Add or View SEPA Information
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: add or view SEPA information? checkbox

BaseField.Name: SEPA Threshold Determination Issued Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: SEPA threshold determination issued date calendar control

BaseField.Name: SEPA Comment Period Start Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: SEPA comment period start date calendar control

BaseField.Name: SEPA Comment Period End Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: SEPA comment period end date calendar control

BaseField.Name: SEPA Number of Comments Received
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: SEPA number of comments received text input

BaseField.Name: SEPA NFD Issued Date
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: SEPA NFD issued Date calendar control

BaseField.Name: SEPA View or Add Addendum Information
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: SEPA View or Add Addendum Information checkbox
BaseField.Text: View or Add SEPA Addendum Information?

BaseField.Name: DG SEPA Addendums
BaseField.DataFilter: [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: DG Amendments
BaseField.DataFilter: [FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' AND [Status] <> 'Draft' AND [Status] <> 'Required Signature Pending' AND [Status] <> 'Required Signatures Received' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Amendment NOD View or Edit
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Amendment NOD View or Edit checkbox
BaseField.Text: Edit or View Amendment NOD Information?

BaseField.Name: Amendments NOD DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [Decision Control] = 'AMENDNOD' AND [Related Record ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Related Record ID] <> '' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled' AND [Status] <> 'Draft'

BaseField.Name: Amendment Status History View Information
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Amendment Status History View Information checkbox

BaseField.Name: Amendment Status History DG
BaseField.DataFilter: [FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' AND [Form Type] = 'FPAN Amendment Request'

BaseField.Name: NOT View or Add
BaseField.Text: View or Add Notice of Transfer Information?

BaseField.Name: DG Notice of Transfer
BaseField.DataFilter: [FPAN Number] = '{{FPAN Number}}' AND [Status] <> 'Draft' AND [Status] <> 'Required Signature Pending' AND [Status] <> 'Required Signatures Received' AND [Status] <> 'Disabled'

BaseField.Name: Typed Water Type S
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: In or Over Typed Water - Type S
BaseField.Text: In or Over Typed Water - Type S

BaseField.Name: Group A Or B Spring Water System
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Group A or B Spring Water System
BaseField.Text: Group A or B Spring Water System

BaseField.Name: Group A Or B Surface Water System
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Group A or B Surface Water System
BaseField.Text: Group A or B Surface Water System

BaseField.Name: Landowner DAHP Tribe Agreed
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: Landowner | DAHP | Tribe agreed to management plan
BaseField.Text: Landowner | DAHP | Tribe agreed to management plan

BaseField.Name: btnCreateDocNoT
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: create document notice of transfer button

BaseField.Name: btnCreateDocLTAStep1NOD
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: create document LTA Step 1 NOD button

BaseField.Name: btnCreateDocLTA5dayNotice
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: create document LTA 5 day notice button

BaseField.Name: Label487
BaseField.Text: Instructions: To upload documentation, select the document type and then select the upload button below. View documentation by selecting the View Documentation button.

BaseField.Name: DG Associated Documents
BaseField.DataFilter: [ARP ID or WTM RP ID] = '{{Form ID}}' AND [Associated_Document_Relation_Links_View].[Status] <> 'Disabled' AND ({{Associated Docs Filter}})

BaseField.Name: Label43
BaseField.Text: Instructions: This section is only visible to VaultAccess users. Check Administrator Override to remove read-only configurations and show all fields. Select Admin Save to save any changes without applying business rules. Remember to uncheck override and save before closing.

BaseField.Name: Label521
BaseField.Text: Old FPAN Renewal Date of Receipt

BaseField.Name: Old FPAN Renewal Date of Receipt
No LTA Step 1 submitted form
BaseField.AccessibilityLabel: No LTA Step 1 submitted form flag

Group.GroupName: Field Staff Create Document Buttons Read Only
Show FPA/N or Aerial Status History DG
Show FPA/N or Aerial Status History Tab
Show FPA/N Renewal Status History DG
Show FPA/N Renewal Status History Tab
Show LTA Step 1 Status History DG
Show LTA Step 1 Status History Tab
